title: CareerLab
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
CareerLab
Learn more details about CareerLab through CareerLab Guide.
CareerLab Online Resources
Online Courses
Career Development Online Courses serve as the fundamental career education content of the CareerLab. The course is targeted at the NYU Shanghai students who have limited knowledge and experience for their career development. The course aims at helping students understand fundamental logic, learn methods and gain practice for classic career topics.
Log on NYU Brightspace to start your online career learning journey!
Industry Exploration - Connect Your Interests to Society
Write Your First Winning Resume
Become an Interview Master Today
Internship Search - Goals, Methods, and Resources
Virtual Networking - Zero to One
Craft Your Compelling Cover Letters
Digital Toolkits
Digital Toolkits are to accompany students with interactive practice and provide instant feedback, which creates a critical learning environment to help students transfer the knowledge into skills.
Learn more about Digital Toolkits
Video Libraries
Video Libraries are an extension to students' career vision and skill development. They are unlimited resources to support students' further development, which are suitable for those who have gone through the basic career topics above and need to learn broader and deeper for specific fields.
NYU Stream CCD Channel Contains CCD event recordings from industry knowledge, on-campus recruitment sessions to I AM LIMITLESS Conference, career preparation, etc.
Employment and Entrepreneurship Video Library The platform courses are designed according to the current national requirements for employment and entrepreneurship education. The lecturers are from top domestic universities, well-known experts in the field of entrepreneurship, and senior management leaders of large and medium-sized enterprises. The platform language is Chinese.
Training (Linkedin Learning) Provides video courses taught by industry experts in software, creative, and business skills. All the courses on LinkedIn fall into four categories: Business, Creative, Technology and Certifications.
Learn more details about CareerLab through
CareerLab Guide
How Can the CCD Support You, Anywhere, Anytime
LabGenius Guidance
LabGenius aims to efficiently help you to identify suitable online resources and remove utilization obstacles. They are CareerLab Online Resource experts who act as guides to direct your learning path.
LabGenius are NYU Shanghai students who receive a series of thorough training and pass required tests to gain qualification. One integrated guidance service session usually lasts 15 minutes. Come to LabGenius walk-in hours:
10:00 am - 6:00 pm, Monday - Friday, Fall & Spring semesters
Learn more about how can LabGenius help you
Why an internship?
Networking 101
A tour of Video Libraries
